transactions.desc: The Cubs acquired Kelly from the Dodgers on Sunday in exchange for cash considerations, Jared Wyllys of AllCHGO.com reports.
Haggerty was released by the Rangers on Sunday.
Petry was promoted to Double-A Harrisburg on Sunday, Kyle Williams of TheBanner.com reports.
The Blue Jays assigned Andrews to Triple-A Buffalo after he cleared waivers Sunday, Ben Nicholson-Smith of Sportsnet.ca reports.
The Angels recalled Aldegheri from Triple-A Salt Lake on Sunday.
Colorado optioned Shook to Triple-A Albuquerque on Sunday.
The Rockies recalled Peralta from Triple-A Albuquerque on Sunday.
The Diamondbacks optioned Abner to Triple-A Reno on Sunday.
Arizona reinstated Clarke from the family medical emergency list Sunday.
Pittsburgh selected Wendzel's contract from Triple-A Indianapolis on Sunday.
The Pirates optioned Garcia to Triple-A Indianapolis on Sunday.
The Reds optioned Mey to Triple-A Louisville on Sunday.
The Reds activated Lowder (shoulder) from the 15-day injured list Sunday.
The Athletics traded RHP Joel Kuhnel to the Milwaukee Brewers.
The Nationals recalled Cornelio from Triple-A Rochester on Saturday, Spencer Nusbaum of The Athletic reports.
The Los Angeles Dodgers traded LHP Antoine Kelly to the Chicago Cubs.
Salazar cleared waivers and received an outright assignment to Triple-A Sugar Land on Saturday, Brian McTaggart of MLB.com reports.
The Nationals optioned Henry to Triple-A Rochester on Saturday.
The Angels designated Martinez for assignment Saturday.
The Angels activated Schanuel (ankle) from the 10-day injured list Saturday.
The Dodgers recalled Frasso from Triple-A Oklahoma on Saturday.
The Yankees recalled Escarra from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Saturday.
Tromp cleared waivers Saturday and elected free agency, Barrett Sallee of 680 The Fan Atlanta reports.
The Brewers selected Rom's contract from Triple-A Nashville on Saturday, Curt Hogg of the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel reports.
The Yankees selected Sanchez's contract from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Saturday.
The Red Sox recalled Gamboa from Triple-A Worcester on Saturday, Ari Alexander of 7 News Boston reports.
Pop elected free agency after being outrighted to Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Saturday.
The Diamondbacks recalled Jameson from Triple-A Reno on Saturday.
The Diamondbacks optioned Strowd to Triple-A Reno following Friday's game against the Nationals.
The Orioles designated Wilson for assignment Saturday.
